Appearances:
Plaintiff, The Gaylord Hotel is present. Represented by Joe Varga
Attorney, Edward Singer, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Julie Keller, is present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Sandy McNabb, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-12-2010 is vacated.
